sections.title: What is the Complete Blood Count (CBC) Test?
paragraphs: Also known as CBC, complete blood count test, blood CP, or blood complete picture, it is a group of tests that provide information about blood cells such as Red Blood Cells (RBC), White Blood Cells (WBC) and Platelets.
CBC test in Pakistan is a simple routine test that helps medical practitioners understand the overall health of an individual.
sections.listTitle: Doctors recommend a CBC test if you have the following symptoms:
list: Problem with blood pressure or heart rate

sections.title: CBC Test Price in Pakistan
paragraphs: CBC test price in Pakistan ranges between (500-1000) Rupees. The cost varies depending upon the lab and city you choose. Book through Sehat Connect to get the best discounted rates in Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Multan, and other major cities.

list: Click on the lab test online via our website or app
Select CBC test or upload prescription

Our representative will call you for confirmation

sections.title: Why is a Complete Blood Count (CBC) Test Conducted?
list: Evaluate the overall health of a person
Detect any abnormality in the blood
Diagnose different blood infections and disorders
Monitor efficacy of treatment such as chemotherapy

sections.title: What is a CBC Test Good For?
paragraphs: The CBC test helps your medical practitioner diagnose and assess various infections, diseases and disorders such as anemia, vitamin deficiencies, bone marrow disorders, and blood cancers.

faq.question: Do I need to fast before a CBC test?
faq.answer: No fasting is usually required for a routine CBC unless your doctor advises otherwise.

faq.question: How long do CBC results take?
faq.answer: Most partner labs deliver CBC results within 24 hours of sample collection.

faq.question: Can I book home sample collection?
faq.answer: Yes. Select home sampling at checkout where available in your city.

sections.title: What is a Lipid Profile Test?
paragraphs: A lipid profile measures cholesterol and triglycerides in your blood to assess heart disease risk.

sections.title: Lipid Profile Price in Pakistan
paragraphs: Prices vary by city and lab. Book online with Sehat Connect for discounted rates.

faq.question: Is fasting required?
faq.answer: Yes, 9-12 hours of fasting is typically recommended before a lipid profile.

sections.title: What is an HbA1c Test?
paragraphs: HbA1c reflects your average blood sugar levels over the past 2-3 months and is used to monitor diabetes.

sections.title: What is a Liver Function Test?
paragraphs: LFT measures enzymes and proteins in the blood to evaluate liver health and detect liver disease.
